Skip to contents
pgatouR 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with pgatouR

Package index

Live Tournament Data

pga_leaderboard()
Get tournament leaderboard
pga_current_leaders()
Get current leaders snapshot
pga_tee_times()
Get tee times for a tournament
pga_scorecard()
Get hole-by-hole scorecard
pga_shot_details()
Get shot-level tracking data
pga_odds()
Get odds to win for a tournament
pga_coverage()
Get broadcast/streaming coverage info

Statistics & Standings

pga_stats()
Get PGA Tour statistics
pga_fedex_cup()
Get FedExCup standings
pga_scorecard_comparison()
Get scorecard stat comparison between players

Players & Tournaments

pga_players()
Get PGA Tour player directory
pga_tournaments()
Get tournament metadata
pga_schedule()
Get season schedule

Player Profiles

pga_player_profile()
Get player profile overview
pga_player_career()
Get player career data
pga_player_results()
Get player tournament results
pga_player_stats()
Get player stats profile
pga_player_bio()
Get player bio
pga_player_tournament_status()
Get player tournament status

Content

pga_news()
Get news articles
pga_news_franchises()
Get news franchise/category list
pga_videos()
Get player video highlights
pga_tourcast_videos()
Get shot-by-shot video clips for a player round

Data

stat_ids
PGA Tour Stat ID Lookup Table

On this page
